Unit 06 Plant Structure and Function

Source guide

Plant structure is organized around roots, stems, and leaves. Each organ supports transport, photosynthesis, protection, and growth in coordinated ways.

  • Photosynthesis occurs primarily in leaves.
  • Roots absorb water and minerals from the soil.

This text lives in notes and should open without source metadata.
